decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 7/10 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 12 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 touched preferences but did not restructure for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 56/2852 lines reworked (2.0%, 28/50). 0/33 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 1.3% (13/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 37. Session 8: 38 (process:20 efficiency:14 ttfw:4). Session 9: 54 (process:20 efficiency:22 ttfw:12). Session 10: 35 (process:20 efficiency:11 ttfw:4). Session 11: 30 (process:20 efficiency:7 ttfw:3). Session 12: 30 (process:20 efficiency:9 ttfw:1).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 235/235 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Only one adapter implements an interface. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
